_meta.note: Most recent quarter. One quarter ahead of PANW Q2 FY26. Fortinet is the margin leader in the peer set.

fy26_guidance_raised.note: Guidance raised post Q1 beat. 37% stock rally over 7 sessions after print.

platform_narrative: Fortinet is the margin story: 35.8% non-GAAP operating margin is the highest in the peer set. Product revenue +41% YoY signals hardware refresh cycle AND platform expansion. Billings +31% is a leading indicator. FCF $1.01B in a single quarter shows extraordinary cash conversion. FTNT competes on price/performance — the 'good enough' consolidation play vs PANW's premium platform narrative.
